# V1.0.8

## New
- Multi-Select: select multiple images to delete, share,
  or view combined info (size, MP, type)
- Double-tap the gallery tab -> scroll to top of gallery
- Double-tap the settings tab -> scroll to top of settings
- Delete confirmation dialog in fullscreen viewer
- Export app logs to Downloads folder

## Improvements
- Auto-cleanup: old APK files removed after update
- Smoother gallery scrolling (ghost widget fix, thread safety)
- Settings screen consolidated (duplicate classes removed)

## Fixes
- Fixed theme toggle getting stuck in an infinite recursion loop
- Fixed phantom image icons appearing in gallery grids
- Fixed button text cut off on some Android screens
- Fixed wallpaper count showing wrong numbers
- Fixed typo in widget description
- Various performance and stability fixes
